insights.title: Curriculum insights
insights.subtitle: Read-only analytics across {subject}'s scheme of work.
insights.noCurriculum: No curriculum has been synced yet.
insights.notAvailable: Not available for this subject yet.
insights.fillsInNote: This fills in automatically as mapped curriculum is imported.

card1.title: Teaching hours per month
card1.subtitle: Daily lessons counted per month for {year}.
card1.flagNote: Below {pct}% of this year's median ({median} h).
card1.empty: No teaching hours recorded for this subject yet.

card2.themeNote: This subject isn't focus-area structured — grouped by theme instead.
card2.subtitleFocus: Share of teaching time across focus areas, broken down by topic.
card2.subtitleTheme: Share of teaching time across themes.
card2.empty: No focus-area or theme data recorded for this subject yet.

card3.title: Spiralling across years
card3.subtitle: Where each topic is taught across the years. Presence only — no depth signal is derived.
card3.empty: This subject has no focus-area or theme structure to spiral across years yet.

card4.title: Coverage & gaps
card4.subtitle: Teaching hours per topic per year. A cross marks a year with no teaching.
card4.gapNarrative: {topic} drops out in {gap}, then reappears in {reappear}.
card4.gapNarrativeOpenEnd: {topic} was last taught in {last} and hasn't returned since.
card4.empty: No focus-area or theme data recorded for this subject yet.
